_comment: Hephaestus deep-worker behavior layer. Domain-agnostic. Persistence, exploration-first, root-cause bias, three-attempt protocol, evidence-based completion. Model-agnostic — pick any model (gpt-*, glm-*, deepseek-*, claude-*, qwen-*, ...). Resolution order: (1) --model CLI flag if given, (2) else LLM_BASE_NAME env, (3) else fall through to common_ai_agent defaults. This workspace intentionally leaves env empty so model selection is never overridden here.

meta.name: hephaestus
meta.description: Deep-worker guardrails layered on top of base agent. Tool-neutral, model-agnostic. Forges code with persistence, root-cause bias, and evidence-based completion.

env._comment: Empty by design. Do NOT pin a model here. Model resolution order: --model CLI flag > LLM_BASE_NAME env > common_ai_agent defaults. Add only domain-neutral runtime knobs if needed (e.g. MAX_ITERATIONS).
